feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: DTP load performance issue relate to RSSTATMANREQMAP
entry.content:
Hi,

We are experiencing an performance issue when launching DTP and retrieving the DTP log.

When we tried to open the DTP log in the process chain or launch a DTP load, it took a long time doing sequential read on the RSSTATMANREQMAP table, which is the DTP status table. Sometimes it could take up to 10 minutes or more to open the DTP log.

We tried OSS note 2248351 to run

  • RSSTATMAN_DELETE_OLD_REQMDEL
  • RSBK_REORG_RSSTATMANREQMAP_DEL

    These didn't help.

    Just wonder is anyone experience this situation and any solution on that.

     Regards,

entry.title: Problems with SQL Server Statistics.
entry.content:
Dear experts.

We have some programs (Z) making high costing accesess to some tables, related with this, for some tables we create new statistics in a daily basis (MSEG, PRPS and so on..) the problem is that some days (not always) those programs degradate drastrically and we need to re-create statistics in order to recover normal performance.

The question we want to ask is that any of you have had this behaviour before and found (or know) any reason for it.

Could you please give us some hint about this (strange) issue?.

Hope you could help us.

entry.title: SAP BTP - Forms Service by Adobe and Forms Service by Adobe API free tier
entry.content:
Hi,

I create an instance for Forms Service by Adobe and Forms Service by Adobe API using Free plan.

I also add the roles ADSAdmin and TemplateStoreAdmin to my user.

I am now trying to access the configuration UI using the following links provided in the documentation, links:

https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/ui/customer/index.html
https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/adsrestapi/ui.html

For some reason it´s not possible to me to access it.

Can you help me with this issue?

Best Regards

Jose Pimenta

entry.title: UI Error VL02N using Sliptream Engine
entry.content:
There is a UI5 error when executing VL02N using the Slipstream Engine. When users navigate to the Detailed Data for Handling Unit screen, the error: "Rendering has been re-started too many times (21). Add URL parameter sap-ui-xx-debugRendering=true for a detailed analysis."

Please advise on corrective action.

entry.title: SAP CICD pileplie for SAP JAVA
entry.content:
We have plan to integrate GIT LAB with SAP PO (JAVA 7.5) system on Azure for CI/CD pipeline, please suggest note or SAP Standard document for the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: REFX Lease Liability Entry
entry.content:
Dear Team 

In REFX module for reduction in lease liability entries are getting posted in the system but against the expense GL , cost centre is not getting displayed. From configuration perspective need to know all the steps to get the cost center at the expense line item level.

Thanks

Viral Guruji

entry.title: System locked; license is invalid or expired
entry.content:
I have migrated a server from a SUSE server to a Red Hat server, and after the migration, i have installed a temporary license for testing purposes. The temporary license expired or became invalid. Now, when i attempt to install a permanent license, i am encountering the following error: 

System locked; license is invalid or expired.

entry.title: Can't see newly purchased OEM IQ and ASE licenses Invoice
entry.content:
Please advise why we can't see the newly purchased OEM IQ and ASE licenses via Invoice

 

DIGITS -SAP Sybase IQ Enterprise Edition - OEM our order no. DIGITS 48 Unit 
DIGITS -SAP Adaptive Server Ent Cluster Ed - OEM our order no. DIGITS 48 Unit

 

Under tub Request License Key they do not appear.

 

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Perform a heterogeneous system copy from OS: AIX to SUSE and DB: Oracle to HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

We are planning to perform a heterogeneous system copy for the following environment:

Source System Details:

SAP NetWeaver Release:
SAP NETWEAVER    7.5    04 (07/2016)    
EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0    EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0    03 (08/2016) FP    

DB-SID: QAS
Database: Oracle 19.24.0.0.0
Operating System: AIX 7300-01-02-2320
Hostname: ECCSAP1

Target System Details:
DB-SID: QAS
Database: SAP HANA 2.0 SP79.01
Operating System: SLES 15 SP5
Hostname: ECCSAP2

In Simple
OS - AIX to SUSE Linux
DB - Oracle to HANA

Size of the Source DB is 6TB

Could you please advise on the prerequisites that need to be completed in the source system before initiating the export?

I’ve mentioned a few things; apart from those, is there anything else that needs to be performed?

1.The PSAPTEMP tablespace needs to be increased.
2.The SMIGR_CREATE_DDL report must be executed in the production client of the source database.

Please let me know if any more additional report need to be executed in the production client of the source database required for the HANA DB.
Please let me know if any Oracle Parameters/ Oracle Tablespace need to be changed in the source system before initiating the export

Your guidance on this would be appreciated.

Regards

Appuru

entry.title: Oracle log mode set to No archive mode during System copy Export
entry.content:
Dear All,

We are planning to perform a heterogeneous system copy from ORACLE to HANA

Can we switch the Oracle log mode to No Archive during a system export to minimize log generation?
OR
is it mandatory to keep the log mode set to Archive during a system export?

Please confirm.

Regards

Appuru

entry.title: Need to enable HTTPS for JAVA SCS node
entry.content:
Please help us with the steps involved to enable HTTPS in  JAVA SCS node.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to identify the highest number of rows and the largest size tables within a specific tablespace
entry.content:
Dear All,

I plan to perform a system copy export from an Oracle database to a HANA database, with a size of 6TB. To optimize the process, I intend to implement table splitting.

Using the DBACOCKPIT  transaction code in SAP (SPACE - SEGMENTS - TOP Sizes), I can identify the Top 50 largest table. However, I need to determine which tables have the highest number of rows within a specific tablespace

Could you please advise on how to identify such tables within a specific tablespace?

Is there a way to check this directly in the SAP system, or is there an Oracle query that can be used for this purpose?

Please let me know how to identify the highest number of rows and the largest size tables within a specific tablespace in Oracle.

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: ServerCrash
entry.content:
Dear expert，

The user reported that they were unable to access the server. I used sapcontrol - nr 01- function VNet cessList on the Netweaver Java application server to check the instance running status, and the textstatus of jstart showed "Some Processes running" I found the file in the attachment in the server directory/sapmnt/SID/golbal/sapcontrol/snapshots.

I found a compressed file in the directory, which contains a description.txt file and a log directory. The content of description.txt is 'Servercrash '. I found the jstart file in the log directory and it showed below:

<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] Thu Jan 9 10:53:49 2025</item>
<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] *** LOG => Send SIGINT to ICM (pid 16077).</item>
<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] *** LOG => Process icm stopping (pid 16077).</item>
<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] *** LOG => Instance state is "Some processes running" (RUNNING @ 2, INACTIVE).</item>
<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] *** LOG => Signal 17 SIGCHLD.</item>
<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] *** WARNING => process ICM (pid 16077) killed (signal 11). [sfuxlib.hpp 854]</item>
<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] *** LOG => Process icm died (pid 16077).</item>
<item>F [Thr 140016985638784] *** WARNING => Node icm failed: result -1, exit code 139. [sfxxnode.hpp 1036]</item>

I checked the memory, but found that it was only half used. What else can I check?

entry.title: Outh2.0 option not available in REST Sender Adapter in PI/PO System
entry.content:
Our PI/POsystem version is SAP NetWeaver 7.50 ,

Outh2.0 option is available in REST Receiver  Adapter,

also Outh2.0 option is available in REST Adapter Sender with Polling,

but we dont have Outh2.0 option in REST Sender Adapter in PI/PO System，

if I want to release the interface in this way ，please tell me how to solve this problem，thank you.

entry.title: Query on running SMIGR_CREATE_DDL in source system
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are planning to perform a heterogeneous system copy for the following environment:

Source System Details:

SAP NetWeaver Release (ECC system):
SAP NETWEAVER 7.5 04
EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 03 (08/2016)

DB-SID: DEV
Database: Oracle 19.24.0.0.0
Operating System: AIX 7300-01-02-2320
Hostname: eccdev

Target System Details:
DB-SID: DEV
Database: SAP HANA 2.0 SP79.01
Operating System: SLES 15 SP5
Hostname: eccdev

Kindly provide clarification on my below query.

A) Should i execute the report SHDB_GROUP_TABLES_LOAD_BASED before running the SMIGR_CREATE_DDL report in production client of Soruce system

A) When executing SMIGR_CREATE_DDL under HANA options, should we select the following settings?

1.Table Classification
2.Estimated Table Size
3.SAP Business Suite on HANA

Or should we leave it as default ( 1.Table Classification and 2.Estimated Table Size) and proceed with executing the program? Or do we need to remove all the options when running SMIGR_CREATE_DDL

B)According to the system copy guide, could you please confirm if we need to implement the notes included in the attachment of SAP Note 1908075 (REQUIRED_CORRECTION_NOTES.zip)? My system version is SAP NW 7.5 SPS4 ECC instance.

2279106
2264053
2299268
2312217
2324379
2378341
2421685
2347004
2458360
2471909

When I review the notes, they all refer to SAP BW on HANA or BW/HANA, which caused my confusion. Could you please advise me, as my system is an ECC instance?

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: Disabling SSH-RSA algorithms to be compliant with SWIFT standards in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm an SAP PO Consultant. We connect to numerous SFTP servers for picking and placing the files and we use SSH keys for Authentication purposes. We generate those keys and share the public key to them. But recently we're getting the requirements to disable the SSH-RSA algorithms to be compliant with their standards. We generate the keys and share the public key to the client to establish a connection.

So could anyone please guide me how to disable the weak ciphers/alogrithms? 

PS: We have tight deadline for this, so appreciate an early response 🙂

Regards,

Nikhil

entry.title: Hybrid LOB: INSERT/UPSERT Performance
entry.content:
Dear HANA Experts,

i am considering converting some VARBINARY Columns to Hybrid LOB and i am curious on the performance impact for WRITE operations. For READ it is clear to me that all LOB Data bigger some threshold (>1KB in default) is stored on Disk. So there is some I/O overhead for this.

But for the WRITE Performance, i am not sure: is there some additionally WRITE I/O for INSERT/UPSERT necessary, besides the usual sync. commit on LOG disk? is for Hybrid LOB delta store in use? 

My concern originates from SAP note 2000002, point 10: "Increased runtime of INSERT operation on table with hybrid LOB field" -> "INSERTs in hybrid LOBs have to perform disk I/O if the configured memory threshold is exceeded and the data is stored in a disk LOB."

I hope some Experts here in the HANA community can help me with this.

Thank you very much

BR Dominik

entry.title: Remove BW Objects from BW Server, Retaining Only BPC-Related Objects
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are currently using the SAP BPC server on BW. As we plan to migrate BW to SAC, the BW server will no longer be required. However, we need to retain all BPC-related configurations and objects. Could you please provide guidance on how to proceed?

entry.title: sapgui xml file question
entry.content:
I would like to understand which file I should use in the central storage, SAPUILandscapeCore.xml or SAPUILandscape.xml or SAPUILandscapeGlobal.xml.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is the system still vulnerable without using HTTP or the SAP Note 3537476 must to be applied?
entry.content:
HI Team , 

 

SAP Has released one SAP Security Note 3537476 - [CVE-2025-0070] Improper Authentication in SAP NetWeaver ABAP Server and ABAP Platform of Very High Priority but details are not clear to us for assessment to find the impact.

SAP Note mention that "A malicious user is able to steal credentials from an internal RFC communication between server A (HTTP client) and server B (serving the request) of the same system" of HTTP Call. 

 

So our understanding is that if we have any HTTP RFC Destination from ABAP to ABAP system then only this Note is applicable. ABAP to ABAP HTTP Connection could be either for self system or for other ABAP system. I am asking this query because in our Landscape we don't have any HTTP ABAP RFC Destination created for ABAP to ABAP system, so is our system impacted or not of the above Security Note mention. Kindly Help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
